sentences.arabic: الرِّيَاءُ آفَةٌ خَطِيرَةٌ تُفْسِدُ الْأَعْمَالَ الصَّالِحَةَ وَتَحْبَطُهَا، وَقَدْ حَذَّرَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ مِنْهَا تَحْذِيرًا شَدِيدًا وَسَمَّاهَا الشِّرْكَ الْخَفِيَّ.
sentences.translation: Rija (pretvaranje u ibadetu) opasna je bolest koja kvari i poništava dobra djela, i Poslanik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, snažno je upozorio na nju, nazvavši je skrivenim širkom.
sentences.translationEn: Riya (ostentation in worship) is a dangerous disease that corrupts and nullifies righteous deeds, and the Prophet, peace be upon him, severely warned against it, calling it hidden polytheism.

sentences.arabic: فَمَنْ صَلَّى أَوْ تَصَدَّقَ أَوْ صَامَ لِيَمْدَحَهُ النَّاسُ فَلَا أَجْرَ لَهُ عِنْدَ اللهِ، لِأَنَّ الْعَمَلَ لَمْ يَكُنْ خَالِصًا لِوَجْهِهِ الْكَرِيمِ.
sentences.translation: Ko klanja, daje sadaku ili posti kako bi ga ljudi hvalili, nema nagrade kod Allaha, jer djelo nije bilo iskreno posvećeno Njemu.
sentences.translationEn: Whoever prays, gives charity, or fasts in order to be praised by people has no reward with Allah, because the deed was not done purely for His noble sake.

sentences.arabic: وَقَدْ أَوْضَحَ ابْنُ الْقَيِّمِ رَحِمَهُ اللهُ فِي كِتَابِهِ «إِغَاثَةُ اللَّهْفَانِ» أَنَّ الرِّيَاءَ يَنْشَأُ مِنْ حُبِّ الْمَنْزِلَةِ فِي قُلُوبِ النَّاسِ وَالتَّعَلُّقِ بِمَدْحِهِمْ.
sentences.translation: Ibn Kajjim, rahimehullah, u svom djelu 'Igasetul-lehfan' pojašnjava da rija proistječe iz ljubavi prema ugledu u srcima ljudi i vezanosti za njihovu похвalу.
sentences.translationEn: Ibn al-Qayyim, may Allah have mercy on him, explained in his book 'Ighathah al-Lahfan' that riya arises from love of status in people's hearts and attachment to their praise.

sentences.arabic: وَعَلَاجُ هَذِهِ الْآفَةِ يَكُونُ بِتَجْدِيدِ النِّيَّةِ قَبْلَ كُلِّ عَمَلٍ وَالِاسْتِعَاذَةِ بِاللهِ مِنَ الشَّيْطَانِ وَمِنَ النَّفْسِ الْأَمَّارَةِ بِالسُّوءِ.
sentences.translation: Lijek za ovu bolest je obnavljanje nijeta prije svakog djela i utjecanje Allahu od šejtana i od duše koja podstiče na zlo.
sentences.translationEn: The cure for this disease is to renew one's intention before every act of worship and to seek Allah's refuge from Satan and from the soul that incites to evil.

sentences.arabic: وَيَنْبَغِي لِلْمُسْلِمِ أَنْ يَتَعَوَّدَ مُرَاقَبَةَ نِيَّتِهِ فِي كُلِّ وَقْتٍ، وَأَنْ يَجْعَلَ هَمَّهُ رِضَا اللهِ وَحْدَهُ لَا رِضَا الْمَخْلُوقِينَ.
sentences.translation: Muslimanu dolikuje da navikne pratiti svoju namjeru u svakom trenutku i da za cilj uzme jedino Allahovo zadovoljstvo, a ne zadovoljstvo stvorenja.
sentences.translationEn: The Muslim should habitually monitor their intention at all times and make the pleasure of Allah alone their goal, not the pleasure of creation.

sentences.arabic: وَإِذَا صَفَتِ النِّيَّةُ وَخَلَصَ الْعَمَلُ لِلَّهِ بَارَكَ اللهُ فِيهِ وَرَفَعَ بِهِ صَاحِبَهُ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Kada se nijет pročisti i djelo bude iskreno posvećeno Allahu, Allah mu podari bereket i uzdigne vlasnika toga djela na dunjaluku i ahiretu.
sentences.translationEn: When the intention is purified and the deed is made sincerely for Allah, He blesses it and elevates its owner in this world and the next.
